title: Overly large file (500+ lines)
description: A PHP file exceeds 500 lines, suggesting it handles too many responsibilities and should be decomposed. This is informational and common in legacy modules.
explanation: Large files are hard to navigate, review, and test. In CMSMS modules, action files and the main module class tend to accumulate logic that belongs in lib/ classes.
fix: Extract cohesive functionality into focused classes under lib/. Use the module autoloader.

examples.bad: // action.defaultadmin.php — 800 lines handling list, edit, delete, settings, export
